line_items.description: Monthly O&M Service Fee — July 2025 (Clause 4.1 + 5.2 Escalated Rate)
Variable O&M Component — Q1 FY2025-26 (Apr–Jun 2025) @ ₹0.04/kWh × 3,50,00,000 kWh (Clause 6.3)

note: OPPORTUNITY: July availability = 98.4% (above 98% bonus threshold). Vendor is entitled to claim a bonus of 0.4 pp × 1% × ₹14,40,00,000 = ₹5,76,000 but has NOT included it on this invoice. This is an unclaimed revenue opportunity for the vendor.
